journey.name: Publishing Studio
journey.description: Verify that the user can seamlessly share the generated and edited video to external channels.

actions.action: Ensure the app branding shows 'The Factory'.
Ensure the video preview plays cleanly without any of the sections marked 'skipped/red' from the Editing Studio.
Select the option to 'Export / Share' the video.
Confirm that the action successfully triggers the native Photo App save or external share sheet (like YouTube Shorts).
